title: Compressing the Tool Layer
description: Most compression research targets prompts. In agent workflows, tool output is where the tokens actually burn.

title: Parallel Agents, Isolated Contexts
description: Agent workflows are sequential bottlenecks. We built a multiplexer that runs them in parallel with full context isolation.

title: Memory Without Vectors
description: Flat files, structured frontmatter, and grep. A memory architecture for AI agents that doesn't need a vector database.
